name: Sonny Berman
abstract: Saul "Sonny" Berman (April 21, 1925 – January 16, 1947) was an American jazz trumpeter. Berman was born in New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

works.t: Strike Up the Band: The Man I Love

about_quotes.speaker: Woody Herman
about_quotes.evidence: When he did some of his greatest playing with the band, he was 21... So actually, he probably started with us when he was 19 and wound up when he was 21.

about_quotes.speaker: Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: And in the trumpet section was Neil Hefti, Sonny Berman... I stayed with the band... I did go back with Woody’s band.

about_quotes.speaker: Jake Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: But these guys played what they called bop I guess, Sonny Berman and Red Rodney, they were some superb players.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jake Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997
